contents.title: Content Wind
contents.description: A lightweight Nuxt theme to build a Markdown driven website, based on Nuxt Content, TailwindCSS and Iconify ✨

contents.title: About Me
contents.description: Hello there! 👋 I'm Tom Brittenden, and I'm absolutely thrilled to welcome you to my About Me page. Let me take this opportunity to share some fascinating insights into my educational journey, impressive qualifications, and awe-inspiring skill sets that make me stand out from the crowd!

children.value: Hello there! 👋 I'm Tom Brittenden, and I'm absolutely thrilled to welcome you to my About Me page. Let me take this opportunity to share some fascinating insights into my educational journey, impressive qualifications, and awe-inspiring skill sets that make me stand out from the crowd!

I embarked on an incredible academic adventure at Waipapa Taumata Rau, the prestigious University of Auckland, back in 2019. There, I wholeheartedly pursued a Bachelor of Science degree, and let me tell you, it was a transformative experience! 🚀 During my time at the university, I was incredibly passionate about two captivating majors:
Computer Science:  I immersed myself in the captivating world of coding, algorithms, and software engineering, honing my skills to perfection.
Information and Technologies Management:  I couldn't resist diving headfirst into the captivating realm of managing cutting-edge technologies and making strategic decisions to drive success.
Oh, the joy of exploring various modules! 💡 Among them, two shining stars that truly captured my heart were:
📈Data Analytics: Unraveling the mysteries hidden within vast data sets and extracting valuable insights was both challenging and immensely rewarding. 🕵️‍♂️
💻  Software Development:  Creating innovative and user-friendly applications that bring smiles to people's faces fueled my passion for development like nothing else! 🚀
I took on exciting challenges, and my dedication led to remarkable achievements! Let me share with you some of my key courses along with the remarkable grades I earned:
In my relentless pursuit of knowledge, I didn't stop at just a degree! Oh no, I went the extra mile and earned an incredible IIBA Level 1 Systems Analysis microcredential! 🌟
Now, let me share with you the crown jewels of my character—my extraordinary skill sets that set me apart as a true trailblazer! 💫
🗣️  Communication Extraordinaire:  My exceptional communication skills allow me to artfully convey complex ideas in a way that captivates and inspires audiences. 🎙️
🧠  Problem-Solving Dynamo:  I possess an innate ability to tackle challenges head-on, dissecting them with finesse and arriving at ingenious solutions that leave others in awe! 🧩
🌐  Teamwork Enthusiast:  As a fervent advocate of collaboration, I thrive in team environments, leveraging diverse perspectives to achieve remarkable results! 🤝
Hold your breath as I take you on a journey through the technological wonders I've mastered! 🌌

NodeJS/JavaScript Virtuoso: Throughout my degree and modules, I delved deep into the captivating world of web development, with a special focus on NodeJS and JavaScript. I honed my skills in crafting dynamic and interactive web applications that leave users in awe. From server-side scripting with NodeJS to client-side magic with JavaScript, I mastered the art of seamless functionality and stunning user experiences. Whether it's crafting responsive front-end interfaces or building robust back-end systems, I'm a true virtuoso in the realm of web technologies! 🎨💻

HTML/CSS Sorcerer: As a student passionate about creating visually enchanting web experiences, I also honed my skills in HTML and CSS. With a wave of my coding wand, I can breathe life into static web pages, turning them into mesmerizing works of art. My eye for design and keen attention to detail ensure that every element aligns harmoniously, delivering a user interface that is as delightful as it is intuitive. 🎭✨

Responsive Web Design Whiz: In the fast-paced digital landscape, accessibility is key. That's why I made it my mission to become a Responsive Web Design Whiz! Through my studies, I learned the art of crafting websites that adapt seamlessly to various devices and screen sizes. From smartphones and tablets to desktops and beyond, my creations shine brilliantly, ensuring that users can immerse themselves in the magic of the web no matter where they are! 🌈📱

📈 Statistical Modeling Maven: Equipped with an array of statistical techniques from my modules, I honed my abilities as a Statistical Modeling Maven. When faced with real-world challenges, I possess the expertise to design and implement sophisticated statistical models that extract meaningful insights from diverse data sources. My models can forecast trends, identify opportunities, and guide strategic planning, making me an indispensable asset to any data-driven endeavor! 📊

Wow, that was quite a ride! 🎢 Thank you for joining me on this thrilling adventure through my academic and professional endeavors. If you'd like to know more or embark on new projects together, don't hesitate to reach out! Let's create something extraordinary! 🌟🚀
A selection of projects from both my time at the University of Auckland and private endeavours
